zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Frederick Tilney於1420年4月出生在英國林可爾史爾波斯頓時，他的父親Sir Phillip Tilney20歲，母親Isabel de Thorpe26歲。他於大約1443年與Elizabeth Cheney在英國素福爾可阿辛頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1447年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可阿申維爾索普享年27歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可阿申維爾索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Frederick Tilney于1420年4月出生在英国林可爾史爾波斯頓时，他的父亲Sir Phillip Tilney20岁，母亲Isabel de Thorpe26岁。他于大约1443年与Elizabeth Cheney在英国素福爾可阿辛頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1447年在英国英格兰諾福爾可阿申維爾索普享年27岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可阿申維爾索普。

nameMeanings.name: Tilney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Tilney (Norfolk), which derives its name from the Old English personal name Tila, Tilla (genitive Tilan, Tillan) + Old English ēg ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Frederick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Fredrick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Fredric
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Frederick Tilney was born in April 1420, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir Phillip Tilney, was 20 and his mother, Isabel de Thorpe, was 26. He married Elizabeth Cheney about 1443, in Assington, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1447, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27, and was buried in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Frederick Tilney est né en avril 1420, à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Phillip Tilney, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Thorpe, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cheney environ 1443, à Assington, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1447, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterré à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Frederick Tilney im April 1420 in Boston, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Phillip Tilney 20 und seine Mutter Isabel de Thorpe 26. Er hat um 1443 in Assington, Suffolk, England Elizabeth Cheney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1447 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Frederick Tilney è nato il nel aprile 1420 nel Boston, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Phillip Tilney, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Thorpe, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Cheney circa 1443, nel Assington, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1447, nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England.

ja.Boston, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Frederick Tilneyが1420年4月にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンで生まれた時，父Sir Phillip Tilneyは20歳，母Isabel de Thorpeは26歳であった。約1443年にイギリススフォルクアシントンでElizabeth Cheneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1447年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペで27歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Frederick Tilney(이)가 1420년 4월 영국 링코실르 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Phillip Tilney(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Thorpe(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1443년 영국 수폴크 아징턴에서 Elizabeth Cheney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1447년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 애슈웰소에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 애슈웰소에 묻혔다.

mn.Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England: Ashwellthorpe, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Frederick Tilney nasceu em abril de 1420, em Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Phillip Tilney, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Thorpe, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Cheney aproximadamente 1443, em Assington, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1447, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 27 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Frederick Tilney родился апрель 1420 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Phillip Tilney было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Thorpe, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cheney около 1443 г. в местности ассингтон, суффолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1447 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет и был похоронен в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Frederick Tilney nació en abril de 1420, en Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Phillip Tilney, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Isabel de Thorpe, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Cheney aproximadamente 1443, en Assington, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1447, en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultado en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
